DataCalcInsightTemplate.description: Average amount a Customer spent per Order, in the current Year
DataCalcInsightTemplate.expression: SELECT UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm.ssot__Id__c as unifiedindividualid__c, ( SUM(ssot__SalesOrder__dlm.ssot__GrandTotalAmount__c)/COUNT(ssot__SalesOrder__dlm.ssot__Id__c) ) as APV__c FROM UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm JOIN UnifiedLinkssotIndividualReal__dlm ON UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm.ssot__Id__c = UnifiedLinkssotIndividualReal__dlm.UnifiedRecordId__c JOIN ssot__SalesOrder__dlm ON UnifiedLinkssotIndividualReal__dlm.SourceRecordId__c = ssot__SalesOrder__dlm.ssot__SoldToCustomerId__c AND year(ssot__SalesOrder__dlm.ssot__OrderStartDate__c) = year(CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY unifiedindividualid__c
